FBE-REMOVED_ROAD_SIGN.description:
At the start of the next [blue]{Combats}[/blue] combats, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
(Equivalent to 2 turns of [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].)
FBE-REMOVED_ROAD_SIGN.flavor: [red]Proof that you have lost your Kimi spirit.[/red]
FBE-REMOVED_ROAD_SIGN.title: Uprooted Road Sign
FBE-SWORD_OF_STONE_MK2.title: Sword of Stone MkII
FBE-SWORD_OF_STONE_MK2.description: After you lose [red]{HealthToLose}[/red] HP, transform into a powerful [gold]Relic[/gold].
FBE-SWORD_OF_STONE_MK2.flavor: [red]The second-generation retail version of the Sword of Stone.[/red]
FBE-INSIGHT.title: Insight
FBE-INSIGHT.description: Upon pickup, view [blue]{RewardCount}[/blue] cards from [gold]other characters[/gold]. Add any number of them to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
FBE-INSIGHT.flavor: [red]This power does not belong to you.[/red]
FBE-INSIGHT.selectionScreenPrompt: Choose any number of cards to add to your Deck
FBE-REDEMPTION.title: Redemption
FBE-REDEMPTION.description: At the end of Boss combat, heal [blue]{Heal}[/blue] HP.
FBE-TOP_HAT.title: Top Hat
FBE-TOP_HAT.description:
Card rewards contain an additional [gold]Bomb[/gold].
[gold]Bomb[/gold] costs [blue]0[/blue].
FBE-DIPLOPIA.title: Diplopia
FBE-DIPLOPIA.description: Upon pickup, obtain an additional copy of every card in your [gold]Deck[/gold].
FBE-P_H_D.title: PhD
FBE-P_H_D.description: Whenever you use a Potion during combat, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
FBE-DARK_BUM.title: Dark Bum
FBE-DARK_BUM.description: Each turn, [gold]Exhaust[/gold] the first card you play and gain a [gold]random effect[/gold].
FBE-ANARCHIST_COOKBOOK.title: Anarchist Cookbook
FBE-ANARCHIST_COOKBOOK.description: At the start of combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Mayhem[/gold] and add a [gold]Mayhem[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
FBE-ANARCHIST_COOKBOOK.flavor: [blue]Never let them know your next move.[/blue]
FBE-STARTER_DECK.title: Starter Deck
FBE-STARTER_DECK.description: Upon pickup, choose [blue]3[/blue] of [blue]6[/blue] card bundles to add to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
FBE-STARTER_DECK.previewAddPrompt: Confirm to select this card bundle
FBE-STARTER_DECK.previewRemovePrompt: Confirm to deselect this card bundle
